{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Striker blades
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Striker blades]] can be sent from Goldsigns.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14">''Waybound'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
